message:
feat: redesign navigation header with enhanced mobile menu

Complete navigation redesign with improved aesthetics and mobile UX:

SCROLL BEHAVIOR REFINEMENT:
- Scroll threshold: window.scrollY > 50→window.scrollY > 20
- Triggers shrinking earlier for more responsive feel
- Creates better visual feedback during page navigation

HEADER CONTAINER:
- Wrapped entire component in fragment (<>...</>) for menu positioning
- Background: Complex gradient→bg-slate-950/70 (cleaner)
- Border: border-slate-900/80→border-slate-900/50 (more subtle)
- Added conditional shadow: scrolled ? shadow-lg shadow-slate-950/50 : ""
- Removed gradient (from/via/to) in favor of solid backdrop
- Maintained backdrop-blur-xl for depth

Inner Container Spacing:
- Scrolled state: py-2/md:py-3→py-3 (consistent across breakpoints)
- Default state: py-3/sm:py-4→py-4/sm:py-5 (more generous)
- Removed complex responsive padding variations
- Cleaner, more predictable spacing behavior

LOGO & BRANDING:
Complete redesign of home link:
- Added "group" class for hover effects
- Gap: gap-2→gap-2.5 (more space)
- Added onClick={() => setOpen(false)} to close mobile menu on logo click

Icon refinements:
- Size: h-8/w-8→h-9/w-9 (slightly larger, more prominent)
- Icon: h-4/w-4→h-5/w-5 (proportional scaling)
- Color: text-slate-50→text-white (pure white for contrast)
- Added group-hover:scale-105 transition
- Glow: shadow-slate-900/70→shadow-slate-900/50
- Overlay: bg-white/10→bg-white/20 mix-blend-soft-light→mix-blend-overlay

Text layout:
- Changed to leading-none (tighter vertical spacing)
- Location text:
  * Size: text-xs→text-[10px] (smaller, more subtle)
  * Weight: font-medium→font-bold
  * Tracking: [0.25em]→[0.2em]
  * Color: text-slate-400→text-slate-500
  * Added transition-colors group-hover:text-sky-400
  * Split location: "SEATTLE" instead of full "Seattle, WA"
- Name text:
  * Size: text-sm/sm:text-base→text-base (consistent)
  * Weight: font-semibold→font-bold
  * Color: text-slate-50→text-slate-100
  * Added mt-0.5 spacing from location
  * No hover state needed (whole link is interactive)

DESKTOP NAVIGATION:
Complete redesign of nav pills:
- Gap: gap-6→gap-1 (tighter, more compact)
- Removed complex text classes from nav wrapper

Nav items:
- Added relative positioning to each link
- Padding: Explicit px-3/py-2 (was px-3/py-1 in span)
- Size: text-sm (maintained)
- Weight: font-medium (maintained)
- Base color: Direct on link with transition-colors
- Hover: hover:text-slate-100 (direct on link)

Active pill:
- Background: bg-sky-500/18→bg-slate-800/50 (more subtle, neutral)
- Spring: stiffness 380→300 (slightly slower, more elegant)
- Maintained layoutId="nav-pill" for smooth transitions

Active/inactive text:
- Active: text-slate-50→text-sky-100 (sky accent for active state)
- Inactive: text-slate-300→text-slate-400 (de-emphasized)
- Moved from nested span to link itself with relative z-10

CTA BUTTON (Desktop):
Complete redesign:
- Added "hidden md:inline-flex" wrapper (desktop only)
- Size: px-3/py-1.5→px-4/py-2 (larger touch target)
- Text: text-xs/md:text-sm→text-sm (consistent)
- Weight: font-medium→font-semibold
- Color: text-slate-100→text-slate-200
- Background: border-slate-700/80 bg-slate-900/80→border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-800/40
- Rounded: rounded-lg→rounded-full (modern pill shape)
- Shadow: shadow-sm shadow-slate-900/70→shadow-sm shadow-slate-950/50
- Added ring-1 ring-inset ring-white/5 for subtle depth
- Hover:
  * border-slate-500 removed
  * bg-slate-900→bg-slate-800
  * Added hover:text-white
  * Added hover:ring-white/10
- Added active:scale-95 for press feedback
- Transitions: All properties smooth (transition-all)

MOBILE MENU BUTTON:
Redesigned with animated icon transitions:
- Removed complex border/background styling
- Size: h-11/w-11→h-10/w-10 (slightly smaller)
- Rounded: rounded-lg→rounded-lg (maintained)
- Colors: Simplified to text-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-800/50 hover:text-white
- Icon size: h-5/w-5→h-6/w-6 (larger, more visible)
- Removed border completely (cleaner)
- Added relative positioning for icon container

Icon Animation (NEW):
- Wrapped icons in AnimatePresence with mode="wait"
- X icon (close):
  * initial: opacity 0, rotate -90
  * animate: opacity 1, rotate 0
  * exit: opacity 0, rotate 90
  * duration: 0.2s
- Menu icon (hamburger):
  * initial: opacity 0, rotate 90
  * animate: opacity 1, rotate 0
  * exit: opacity 0, rotate -90
  * duration: 0.2s
- Creates smooth rotation transition between states
- Icons wrapped in motion.div with unique keys

MOBILE MENU DROPDOWN:
Complete restructure and redesign:

Container:
- Position: Changed to absolute positioning
- Placement: style={{ position: "absolute", top: "100%" }}
- Added fixed top-[60px] left-0 right-0 z-30 (consistent positioning)
- Background: bg-slate-950/95→bg-slate-950/95 (maintained)
- Border: border-t border-slate-900/80→border-b border-slate-800/50
- Added overflow-hidden for clean edges
- Enhanced backdrop-blur-xl
- Timing: duration 0.2→0.3, ease easeOut→[0.32, 0.72, 0, 1] (custom easing)
- Removed md:hidden from container (unnecessary, button controls visibility)

Nav container:
- Padding: px-4/py-3→px-4/py-6 (more vertical space)
- Changed from max-w-6xl mx-auto to simple flex-col
- Removed text-sm (let items control their size)

Nav items:
- Animation: x -10→x -20 (more dramatic entrance)
- Duration: Added explicit 0.3s duration
- Layout: Changed to border-b separator style (not cards)
- Border: border-b border-slate-800/30
- Padding: py-4 (generous tap target)
- Text: text-lg font-medium (larger, more readable)
- Removed rounded-lg and background colors
- Simplified layout: justify-between with active dot
- Active indicator: h-1.5/w-1.5 rounded-full bg-sky-400
- Removed complex hover states (cleaner on mobile)
- Active color: text-sky-400 (matches desktop)
- Inactive: text-slate-300 (maintained)

Mobile CTA (NEW):
- Added dedicated "Get in touch" CTA in mobile menu
- Animation: y 20 with delay 0.3s (enters after nav items)
- Margin: mt-6 (separated from nav items)
- Full width: w-full
- Centered: justify-center
- Rounded: rounded-xl (modern)
- Background: bg-sky-500 (primary brand color)
- Padding: py-3 (comfortable tap target)
- Text: text-base font-bold text-slate-950 (high contrast)
- Shadow: shadow-lg shadow-sky-500/25 (subtle glow)
- Active state: active:scale-[0.98]
- Label: "Get in touch" (friendlier than "Let's talk")
- Closes menu on click: onClick={() => setOpen(false)}

Impact Assessment:

DESKTOP IMPROVEMENTS:
- Cleaner, more modern aesthetic
- Better visual hierarchy with refined colors
- Smoother nav pill transitions
- More prominent CTA button
- Earlier scroll trigger feels more responsive
- Logo hover effect adds polish

MOBILE IMPROVEMENTS:
- Animated menu icon rotation (delightful micro-interaction)
- List-style menu vs cards (cleaner, more native feel)
- Border separators improve scannability
- Larger text (text-lg) more readable
- Dedicated CTA button in menu (better conversion)
- More generous spacing throughout
- Absolute positioning prevents layout shift

INTERACTION POLISH:
- All hover states smooth and predictable
- Active states provide clear feedback
- Scroll shadow adds depth perception
- Logo closes mobile menu (better UX)
- AnimatePresence creates seamless icon swaps
- Custom easing curve feels premium

VISUAL CONSISTENCY:
- Simplified color palette (fewer variants)
- Consistent use of sky-400 for active states
- Slate-800/slate-900 neutrals throughout
- White accents for highest emphasis
- Ring shadows for depth (not harsh borders)

PERFORMANCE:
- Removed complex gradients (faster compositing)
- CSS transforms for animations (GPU accelerated)
- Framer Motion optimizations maintained
- No layout thrashing with absolute positioning

ACCESSIBILITY:
- Larger touch targets (py-4, py-3)
- Higher contrast text (slate-100, white)
- Clear active states (sky-400 accent)
- Smooth transitions aid comprehension
- Proper ARIA attributes maintained
